title: Stock Transfers
confirm_content: Approve this transfer? Stock will not move yet — Ship Out is a separate step.
ship_out_content: Confirm physical shipment? From warehouse on-hand will decrease and To warehouse in-transit will increase.
cancel_content: Please provide a reason for cancellation.
receive_content: Enter received quantity per line. Partial receives are allowed; the transfer becomes Received only when every line is fully received.
search_placeholder: Search by transfer number or remarks
same_warehouse_error: From and To warehouses must differ
no_lines_error: Please add at least one line
